hypothesis: For two-state systems, at late diffusion times the difference between the conditional scores, rSAA(x,t;γ)=sB(x,t;γ)−sA(x,t;γ), is proportional to the true committor gradient ∇q(x), and the cosine similarity between rSAA and ∇q(x) increases monotonically with the classifier-free guidance scale γ.
